mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS event.com_grp_cd ( com_grp_cd_seq BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY ,com_grp_cd VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL ,com_grp_cd_nm VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL ,com_grp_cd_desc VARCHAR(2000) ,ref01 VARCHAR(100) ,ref02 VARCHAR(100) ,ref03 VARCHAR(100) ,sort_seq INTEGER ,use_yn CHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y' ,created_by BIGINT ,updated_by BIGINT ,created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,CONSTRAINT com_grp_cd_code_uk UNIQUE (com_grp_cd) )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS event.com_cd ( com_cd_seq BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY ,com_grp_cd_seq BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES event.com_grp_cd(com_grp_cd_seq) ,com_cd VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL ,com_std_cd VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL ,com_cd_nm VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL ,com_cd_desc VARCHAR(2000) ,refval01 VARCHAR(100) ,refval02 VARCHAR(100) ,refval03 VARCHAR(100) ,sort_seq INTEGER ,use_yn CHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y' ,created_by BIGINT ,updated_by BIGINT ,created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,CONSTRAINT com_cd_group_code_uk UNIQUE (com_grp_cd_seq, com_cd) ,CONSTRAINT com_cd_std_code_uk UNIQUE (com_std_cd) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.com_grp_cd ( com_grp_cd ,com_grp_cd_nm ,com_grp_cd_desc ,ref01 ,sort_seq ,use_yn ) VALUES ( 'ORG_GRADE' ,'Organization Grade' ,'Organization grade and hosted event limit settings.' ,'Hosted Event Limit' ,1 ,'Y' ) ON CONFLICT (com_grp_cd) DO UPDATE SET ref01 = COALESCE(NULLIF(event.com_grp_cd.ref01, ''), EXCLUDED.ref01)

WITH grp AS ( SELECT com_grp_cd_seq FROM event.com_grp_cd WHERE com_grp_cd = 'ORG_GRADE' ) INSERT INTO event.com_cd ( com_grp_cd_seq ,com_cd ,com_std_cd ,com_cd_nm ,com_cd_desc ,refval01 ,sort_seq ,use_yn ) SELECT grp.com_grp_cd_seq ,defaults.com_cd ,'ORG_GRADE_' || defaults.com_cd ,defaults.com_cd_nm ,'Organization grade hosted event limit.' ,defaults.max_event_count ,defaults.sort_seq ,'Y' FROM grp CROSS JOIN ( VALUES ('S', 'S', '10', 1) ,('A', 'A', '5', 2) ,('B', 'B', '3', 3) ,('C', 'C', '1', 4) ) AS defaults(com_cd, com_cd_nm, max_event_count, sort_seq) ON CONFLICT (com_grp_cd_seq, com_cd) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT com_grp_cd_seq ,com_grp_cd ,com_grp_cd_nm ,com_grp_cd_desc ,ref01 ,ref02 ,ref03 ,sort_seq FROM event.com_grp_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_seq, com_grp_cd
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.com_grp_cd ( com_grp_cd ,com_grp_cd_nm ,com_grp_cd_desc ,ref01 ,ref02 ,ref03 ,sort_seq ,use_yn ,created_by ,updated_by ,created_at ,updated_at ) VALUES ( #{comGrpCd} ,#{comGrpCdNm} ,#{comGrpCdDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{ref01,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{ref02,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{ref03,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,COALESCE(#{sortSeq}, 0) ,'Y' ,#{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,#{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (com_grp_cd) DO UPDATE SET com_grp_cd_nm = EXCLUDED.com_grp_cd_nm ,com_grp_cd_desc = EXCLUDED.com_grp_cd_desc ,ref01 = EXCLUDED.ref01 ,ref02 = EXCLUDED.ref02 ,ref03 = EXCLUDED.ref03 ,sort_seq = EXCLUDED.sort_seq ,use_yn = 'Y' ,updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: WITH code_rows AS ( SELECT c.com_cd_seq ,c.com_grp_cd_seq ,g.com_grp_cd ,c.com_cd ,c.com_cd_nm ,c.com_cd_desc ,c.refval01 ,c.refval02 ,c.refval03 ,COALESCE(c.sort_seq, 0) AS sort_seq FROM event.com_grp_cd g INNER JOIN event.com_cd c ON c.com_grp_cd_seq = g.com_grp_cd_seq WHERE g.com_grp_cd = #{comGrpCd} AND g.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.use_yn = 'Y' ), org_stats AS ( SELECT UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(grade, ''), 'C')) AS grade ,COUNT(*) AS organization_count FROM event.organizations GROUP BY UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(grade, ''), 'C')) ), event_stats AS ( SELECT UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(o.grade, ''), 'C')) AS grade ,COUNT(e.event_seq) AS current_event_count FROM event.organizations o LEFT JOIN event.events e ON e.organization_seq = o.organization_seq AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(e.status, '') NOT IN ('rejected', 'cancelled') GROUP BY UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(o.grade, ''), 'C')) ) SELECT cr.com_cd_seq ,cr.com_grp_cd_seq ,cr.com_grp_cd ,cr.com_cd ,cr.com_cd_nm ,cr.com_cd_desc ,cr.refval01 ,cr.refval02 ,cr.refval03 ,cr.sort_seq ,CASE WHEN cr.com_grp_cd = 'ORG_GRADE' THEN COALESCE(os.organization_count, 0) END AS organization_count ,CASE WHEN cr.com_grp_cd = 'ORG_GRADE' THEN COALESCE(es.current_event_count, 0) END AS current_event_count FROM code_rows cr LEFT JOIN org_stats os ON os.grade = cr.com_cd LEFT JOIN event_stats es ON es.grade = cr.com_cd ORDER BY cr.sort_seq, cr.com_cd
mapper.insert: WITH grp AS ( SELECT com_grp_cd_seq FROM event.com_grp_cd WHERE com_grp_cd = #{comGrpCd} ) INSERT INTO event.com_cd ( com_grp_cd_seq ,com_cd ,com_std_cd ,com_cd_nm ,com_cd_desc ,refval01 ,refval02 ,refval03 ,sort_seq ,use_yn ,created_by ,updated_by ,created_at ,updated_at ) SELECT grp.com_grp_cd_seq ,#{comCd} ,#{comGrpCd} || '_' || #{comCd} ,#{comCdNm} ,#{comCdDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{refval01,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{refval02,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{refval03,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,COALESCE(#{sortSeq}, 0) ,'Y' ,#{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,#{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM grp ON CONFLICT (com_grp_cd_seq, com_cd) DO UPDATE SET com_cd_nm = EXCLUDED.com_cd_nm ,com_cd_desc = EXCLUDED.com_cd_desc ,refval01 = EXCLUDED.refval01 ,refval02 = EXCLUDED.refval02 ,refval03 = EXCLUDED.refval03 ,sort_seq = EXCLUDED.sort_seq ,use_yn = 'Y' ,updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: WITH grade_codes AS ( SELECT c.com_cd AS grade ,c.com_cd_nm AS grade_name ,CASE WHEN NULLIF(c.refval01, '') ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN c.refval01::INTEGER ELSE 0 END AS max_event_count ,COALESCE(c.sort_seq, 0) AS sort_seq FROM event.com_grp_cd g INNER JOIN event.com_cd c ON c.com_grp_cd_seq = g.com_grp_cd_seq WHERE g.com_grp_cd = 'ORG_GRADE' AND g.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.use_yn = 'Y' ), org_stats AS ( SELECT UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(grade, ''), 'C')) AS grade ,COUNT(*) AS organization_count FROM event.organizations GROUP BY UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(grade, ''), 'C')) ), event_stats AS ( SELECT UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(o.grade, ''), 'C')) AS grade ,COUNT(e.event_seq) AS current_event_count FROM event.organizations o LEFT JOIN event.events e ON e.organization_seq = o.organization_seq AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(e.status, '') NOT IN ('rejected', 'cancelled') GROUP BY UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(o.grade, ''), 'C')) ) SELECT gc.grade ,gc.grade_name ,gc.max_event_count ,gc.sort_seq ,COALESCE(os.organization_count, 0) AS organization_count ,COALESCE(es.current_event_count, 0) AS current_event_count FROM grade_codes gc LEFT JOIN org_stats os ON os.grade = gc.grade LEFT JOIN event_stats es ON es.grade = gc.grade ORDER BY gc.sort_seq, gc.grade
mapper.insert: WITH grp AS ( SELECT com_grp_cd_seq FROM event.com_grp_cd WHERE com_grp_cd = 'ORG_GRADE' ) INSERT INTO event.com_cd ( com_grp_cd_seq ,com_cd ,com_std_cd ,com_cd_nm ,com_cd_desc ,refval01 ,sort_seq ,use_yn ,created_by ,updated_by ,created_at ,updated_at ) SELECT grp.com_grp_cd_seq ,#{grade} ,'ORG_GRADE_' || #{grade} ,COALESCE(NULLIF(#{gradeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ''), #{grade}) ,'Organization grade hosted event limit.' ,CAST(#{maxEventCount} AS VARCHAR) ,COALESCE(#{sortSeq}, 0) ,'Y' ,#{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,#{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM grp ON CONFLICT (com_grp_cd_seq, com_cd) DO UPDATE SET com_cd_nm = EXCLUDED.com_cd_nm ,com_cd_desc = EXCLUDED.com_cd_desc ,refval01 = EXCLUDED.refval01 ,sort_seq = EXCLUDED.sort_seq ,use_yn = 'Y' ,updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN NULLIF(c.refval01, '') ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN c.refval01::INTEGER ELSE NULL END FROM event.organizations o INNER JOIN event.com_grp_cd g ON g.com_grp_cd = 'ORG_GRADE' AND g.use_yn = 'Y' INNER JOIN event.com_cd c ON c.com_grp_cd_seq = g.com_grp_cd_seq AND c.com_cd = UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(o.grade, ''), 'C')) AND c.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE o.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event.events WHERE organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(status, '') NOT IN ('rejected', 'cancelled')
